title: Cumberland County Probate Court
description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Handles roughly a quarter of all Maine probate filings; page already carries closure notices, fee-schedule links, and rule-change announcements inline.

items.title: Page updated: Cumberland County Probate Court
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Removed:
  - Please note that the Cumberland County Probate Court office will be closed on Friday July 3, 2026 for the Independence Day holiday.
